channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump insists he will not rush to end U.S.‑Iran conflict amid stalled negotiations
item.description: In a live appearance at the White House, President Donald Trump told reporters he would not be pressured into ending the ongoing war with Iran, as indirect negotiations between the two countries conti...

item.title: Luis Salazar Explores Urban Identity Through Double Exposure Photography
item.description: This article highlights a series of striking double exposure photographs by Spanish artist Luis Salazar, where human figures appear seamlessly merged with architectural elements. Rather than simply de...

item.title: Indian seafarer safe as Iran detains vessel in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The Indian government has confirmed that at least one Indian seafarer is among the crew of a commercial vessel seized by Iranian forces near the Strait of Hormuz amid rising maritime tensions. Speakin...

item.title: U.S. State Department Announces $10 Million Reward for Intel on Key Iranian Militia Leader
item.description: The U.S. State Department has announced a substantial $10 million reward through its Rewards for Justice program for credible information leading to the identification, arrest, or conviction of the le...

item.title: Sam Amadi Praises Tinubu’s Political Skill but Criticises His Governance Record
item.description: Former chairman of the Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission (NERC), Sam Amadi, don talk say President Bola Tinubu na very sharp politician, even though he no rate him high when it comes to gover...

item.title: No confirmed date yet for second round of US-Iran talks as Pakistan continues mediation efforts
item.description: There is still no confirmed date for the second round of talks between the United States and Iran, despite ongoing diplomatic efforts led by Pakistan. According to a well-informed source, both sides h...

item.title: Meta and Microsoft cut thousands of jobs amid major AI infrastructure investments
item.description: Meta and Microsoft have announced significant workforce reductions as they ramp up massive spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure. Meta informed staff that it will cut around 10 percent of...

item.title: Trump warns UK over digital services tax with potential tariffs
item.description: US President Donald Trump has warned that he may impose significant tariffs on the United Kingdom if it does not rescind its digital services tax, which affects major US technology companies. Introduc...

item.title: Inquiry Report Shows 518 Deaths Linked to Tanzania’s 2025 Election Violence, Dar es Salaam Most Affected
item.description: An official inquiry in Tanzania has revealed that at least 518 people lost their lives during unrest connected to the General Election held on October 29, 2025, and in the days that followed. The find...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon extend truce amid stalled Iran negotiations
item.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend a fragile ceasefire for another three weeks, announced by US President Donald Trump. The extension comes despite ongoing tensions, including recent Israeli str...

item.title: Pope Leo Condemns Civilian Deaths in Iran and Stresses Opposition to War
item.description: Pope Leo, speaking aboard his return flight to Rome after a four-nation tour in Africa, condemned the killing of protesters in Iran and reiterated his opposition to war. Addressing reports that thousa...

item.title: Trump warns UK of tariffs over digital services tax on US technology companies
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump has publicly warned the United Kingdom that he may impose significant tariffs on British goods if the country does not repeal its digital services tax targeting Amer...

item.title: Alberta-Ottawa Energy Deal Negotiations Stall on Industrial Carbon Tax Timeline
item.description: Negotiations between Prime Minister Mark Carney's federal government and Alberta Premier Danielle Smith continue past the April 1 deadline set in their November memorandum of understanding. A key issu...

item.title: Dangote, Kenya, and Uganda to Develop Large Oil Refinery in Tanzania
item.description: Aliko Dangote, Africa's richest man and CEO of the Dangote Group, announced plans to collaborate with Kenya and Uganda to build a major oil refinery in Tanzania. The project is inspired by Dangote's 6...

item.title: Commission Recommends National Mourning and Support Plan After 2025 Election Violence in Tanzania
item.description: The presidential Chande Commission of Inquiry in Tanzania has recommended the establishment of a national day of mourning to honour more than 500 people who lost their lives during violence connected ...

item.title: Ogoloma Fishermen Appreciate Okrika Council Chairman for Empowerment Initiatives
item.description: The Ogoloma Fishermen Association don hail Chief Hon. Akuro Alfred Tobin, the Okrika Local Government Council Chairman, for the way him dey support grassroots development and empower local fishermen. ...

item.title: Probe Finds 16 Security Officers Killed in Post-Election Violence, No Evidence of Mass Graves
item.description: A presidential commission in Tanzania has revealed that at least 16 security personnel lost their lives during the violence that followed the General Election held on October 29, 2025. The findings we...

item.title: Court hears allegations of child abuse material and murder charges against singer D4vd
item.description: A court has heard serious allegations against singer D4vd, whose real name is David Anthony Burke, as he faces charges over the death of a 14-year-old girl, Celeste Rivas Hernandez. Prosecutors claim ...

item.title: Farouk Kibet Sponsors Treatment for Kakamega Girl's Swollen Leg in India
item.description: Jennifer Khasoa Barasa, a young girl from Kakamega County, has been living with a swollen leg for 12 years, a condition that started after a groin surgery in 2014. Despite several attempts to seek tre...

item.title: East Africa Plans Mega Oil Refinery in Tanga with Dangote Support
item.description: President Yoweri Museveni of Uganda has shown support for a major new oil refinery to be established in Tanga, Tanzania, which will use crude oil from Uganda, Kenya, South Sudan, and DRC. This initiat...
